name: fusion-trace-conventions
description: Semantic conventions for the fusion stack's OpenTelemetry traces. Spans named here are the only spans fusion components emit; attributes named here are the only fusion attributes they carry. Where the OTel GenAI semantic conventions define an attribute (gen_ai.*), it is used instead of a fusion.* invention so model-call spans render natively in GenAI-aware backends (e.g. PostHog LLM analytics). Sensitivity classes drive redaction at sink boundaries: 'local' attributes never leave the machine through the product-telemetry pipeline; 'exportable' attributes may.

fusion.turn.description: 1-based user-turn index within a session; a follow-up message is a new turn.

fusion.dialect.description: Front-door dialect: fusion-step, openai-chat, openai-responses, anthropic-messages, acp, native-passthrough.

fusion.status.description: Terminal status of the unit: succeeded, failed, skipped.

fusion.repo.description: Absolute path of the coding workspace the panel fuses over.

fusion.prompt_preview.description: Leading slice of the user prompt.

fusion.environment.description: JSON environment snapshot: repo, harnesses, judge_model, models[{id,model,endpoint_id,provider}], model_endpoints, fusion_backend_url.

fusion.evidence.description: JSON array of run evidence strings.

fusion.run_id.description: Run-store run id, when the unit corresponds to a persisted run.

fusion.session_id.description: Gateway session key the unit belongs to.

fusion.candidate.id.description: Panel candidate id (one harness run of one panel member within a turn).

fusion.trajectory.id.description: Wire trajectory id carried into the fuse step.

fusion.model.id.description: Panel member id (the short handle from the panel config, e.g. 'gpt').

fusion.branch_name.description: Git branch the candidate worked on.

fusion.worktree_path.description: Worktree directory the candidate worked in.

fusion.step_count.description: Number of trajectory steps the candidate produced.

fusion.proposed_calls.description: JSON array of the candidate's terminal proposal (a bounded rollout's captured k-th batch): [{name, arguments_preview}].

fusion.tool_call_count.description: Number of tool calls in the unit.

fusion.verification_status.description: Candidate verification outcome: passed, failed, skipped.

fusion.final_output_preview.description: Leading slice of the unit's final output.

fusion.final_output.description: Full final output of the unit.

fusion.content.description: Raw content of a judge step response.

fusion.step.type.description: Trajectory step type: reasoning, tool_call, observation, output.

fusion.prompt.description: User/task prompt sent to a panel model.

fusion.system_prompt.description: System prompt sent to a panel model.

fusion.message_count.description: Number of chat messages in a model call.

fusion.tool_count.description: Number of tools offered in a model call.

fusion.judge.model.description: Judge model name for the turn.

fusion.synthesizer.model.description: Synthesizer model name for the fuse step.

fusion.messages.description: JSON chat messages handed to the judge.

fusion.trajectories.description: JSON wire trajectories handed to the judge.

fusion.tools.description: JSON tool definitions handed to the judge.

fusion.trajectory_ids.description: Trajectory ids handed to the judge.

fusion.raw_analysis.description: The judge's raw analyze response (its thinking).

fusion.tool_calls.description: JSON tool calls requested by a judge step.

fusion.analysis.description: JSON structured FusionAnalysis: consensus, contradictions, unique_insights, coverage_gaps, likely_errors.

fusion.metrics.description: JSON judge metrics: best_trajectory, candidate_ranks, recommended_final_structure.

fusion.synthesis_empty.description: True when synthesis produced empty output and a fallback was used.

fusion.synthesis.description: JSON TrajectorySynthesis record (decision, selected id, rationale, metrics).

fusion.selected.trajectory_id.description: Trajectory selected verbatim when decision is select_trajectory.

fusion.judge.degraded.description: Failure category when judge analysis degraded (provider error, parse failure).

fusion.terminal.description: True when a judge step is the turn's terminal step (no pending tool calls).

fusion.fusion_unit.description: What the judge fused: trajectory or trajectory_step.

fusion.endpoint_id.description: Router endpoint id serving a model call or passthrough.

fusion.usage.description: JSON usage blob: prompt_tokens, completion_tokens, total_tokens, latency_s, model_id.

fusion.cost.stage.description: Cost meter stage: panel, judge_synth, passthrough.

fusion.cost.model.description: Model the cost entry was priced against.

fusion.cost.turn_usd.description: USD cost of the metered entry.

fusion.cost.local_compute_usd.description: Estimated local-compute USD cost, when available.

fusion.cost.session_total_usd.description: Session running USD total after this entry.

fusion.cost.unknown.description: True when the entry could not be priced.

fusion.cost.unknown_usage.description: True when the entry had no usable usage.

fusion.output_hash.description: Content hash of a tool execution output.

error.type.description: OTel standard error class/kind for failed units.

http.response.status_code.description: OTel standard HTTP response status code.

gen_ai.operation.name.description: GenAI semconv operation, always 'chat' for fusion model calls.

gen_ai.provider.name.description: GenAI semconv provider: openai, anthropic, openrouter, local-mlx, ...

fusion.run.description: A bounded front-door run: one prompt through panel + fusion to a final output (openai-chat/responses/anthropic/acp dialects). Root of its trace.

fusion.turn.description: One fused turn inside an interactive session: panel fan-out, fuse step, finalize. Parents onto the session's virtual root span context.

fusion.candidate.description: One panel member's harness run for one turn.

fusion.judge.description: The judge phase of one turn on the gateway side: fuse-step request through terminal response.

fusion.fuse.description: Server-side execution of one fuse step (judge analysis + synthesis) in the Python engine. Child of the gateway's fusion.judge span via traceparent.

chat.description: One GenAI model invocation, named '{gen_ai.operation.name} {gen_ai.request.model}' per the OTel GenAI semantic conventions so GenAI-aware backends ingest it natively.

fusion.passthrough.description: A native vendor passthrough request proxied by the gateway. Root of its own trace.

fusion.turn.info.description: Instant marker at run/turn start carrying the environment snapshot and prompt preview, so dashboards can show the unit live before its span ends.

fusion.candidate.started.description: Instant marker at candidate start (live roster signal).

fusion.candidate.step.description: Instant marker for one trajectory step, streamed live as the candidate works.

fusion.model_call.started.description: Instant marker at model-call start carrying the prompts (live signal; terminal facts land on the chat span).

fusion.judge.request.description: Instant marker when the judge is invoked, carrying the full judge input (live 'judging' signal).

fusion.judge.thinking.description: Instant marker for the judge's raw analysis or an intermediate tool-calling step.

fusion.judge.scored.description: Instant marker for the judge's structured analysis and per-candidate scoring.

fusion.judge.synthesis.description: Instant marker for the synthesizer's raw output.

fusion.cost.description: Instant marker for one metered cost entry.

fusion.narration.description: Instant marker mirroring one narration beat into the trace stream.

fusion.tool.execution.description: Instant marker for one tool-execution-record outcome.

fusion.cursor.route.description: Instant marker for a Cursor bridge route decision (emitted by cursorkit, registered here so consumers know the name).
